scenario_description: 用户先要求把系统调得更易读，随后逐步补充更具体的无障碍要求。

phases.instruction: 先帮我把系统文字调大一点，更容易看清。
再把鼠标光标也调大，至少调到 48。
最后打开放大镜，并把倍率调到 1.75 或更高。

result.command: TEXT_SCALE=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface text-scaling-factor 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?' | head -1); CURSOR_SIZE=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface cursor-size 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+' | head -1); MAG_ENABLED=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.a11y.applications screen-magnifier-enabled 2>/dev/null); MAG_FACTOR=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.a11y.magnifier mag-factor 2>/dev/null | grep -oE '[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?' | head -1); if [ -n "$TEXT_SCALE" ] && [ -n "$CURSOR_SIZE" ] && [ "$MAG_ENABLED" = "true" ] && [ -n "$MAG_FACTOR" ] && [ "$(echo "$TEXT_SCALE >= 1.2" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" = "1" ] && [ "$CURSOR_SIZE" -ge 48 ] && [ "$(echo "$MAG_FACTOR >= 1.75" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0)" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
